RunSynchronousCommand.Path: cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:@echo off&echo:call :print ^"Setting keyboard layout for PE session^"&echo:wpeutil.exe SetKeyboardLayout 0409:00000409&echo:for ^%^%d in (C D E F G H I J K L M N O P Q T U V X Y Z^) do ()
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.wim set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.wim^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.esd set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.esd^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.swm set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.swm^" ^& set ^"SWM_PARAM=/SWMFile:^%^%d:\sources\install*.swm^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\autounattend.xml set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%d:\autounattend.xml^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$OEM$ set ^"OEM_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$OEM$^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$ set ^"PEDRIVERS_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$^"&echo:^))
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3^" ^%^%t in ('reg.exe query HKLM\System\Setup /v UnattendFile 2^^^>nul'^) do ( if exist ^%^%t set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%t^" ^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if not defined IMAGE_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate install.wim, install.esd or install.swm.^"&echo:if not defined XML_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate autounattend.xml.^"&echo:set ^"OS_VERSION=11^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3 delims=.^" ^%^%v in ('ver'^) do (&echo:if ^%^%v LSS 20000 set ^"OS_VERSION=10^"&echo:^)&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER (&echo:call :print ^"Loading drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /R ^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^% ^%^%f IN (*.inf^) do drvload.exe ^"^%^%f^"&echo:^)&echo:^>X:\assert.vbs (&echo:echo:Function Fail(message^^^)&echo:echo:WScript.Echo message&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 1&echo:echo:End Function)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:On Error Resume Next&echo:echo:Set wmi = GetObject(^^^"winmgmts:\\.\root\cimv2^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:Set drive = wmi.Get(^^^"Win32_DiskDrive.DeviceID='\\.\PHYSICALDRIVE0'^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:If Err.Number ^^^<^^^> 0 Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Could not locate disk 0 (^^^" ^^^& Err.Description ^^^& ^^^"^^^).^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = drive.InterfaceType&echo:echo:If actual ^^^<^^^> ^^^"IDE^^^" And actual ^^^<^^^> ^^^"SCSI^^^" Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"InterfaceType '^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^"' of disk 0 is unexpected.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 100)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:If actual ^^^< expected Then&echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at least ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 4000&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> expected Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at most ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = drive.Partitions&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> 0 Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"There are already ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" partitions on disk 0.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:WScript.Echo ^^^"Disk assertions were satisfied.^^^"&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 0&echo:^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Running disk assertions^"&echo:cscript.exe //E:vbscript ^"X:\assert.vbs^" //Nologo ^|^| call :fail ^"Disk assertion failed. Windows Setup will halt to avoid potential data loss.^")
cmd.exe /c echo SELECT DISK=0 > X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo CLEAN >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo CONVERT GPT >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo CREATE PARTITION EFI SIZE=300 >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo FORMAT QUICK FS=FAT32 LABEL="System" >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo ASSIGN LETTER=S >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo CREATE PARTITION MSR SIZE=16 >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY SIZE=_CSizeMB_ >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL="Windows" >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo ASSIGN LETTER=W >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY SIZE=1000 >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL="Recovery" >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo ASSIGN LETTER=R >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo SET ID="de94bba4-06d1-4d40-a16a-bfd50179d6ac" >> X:\diskpart.txt
cmd.exe /c echo GPT ATTRIBUTES=0x8000000000000001 >> X:\diskpart.txt

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"diskpart will now partition and format your disk^"&echo:diskpart.exe /s X:\diskpart.txt ^|^| call :fail ^"diskpart.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:set ^"IMG_PARAM=/Name:^"Windows 11 Pro^"^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Applying Windows image to target disk^"&echo:dism.exe /Apply-Image /ImageFile:^%IMAGE_FILE^% ^%SWM_PARAM^% ^%IMG_PARAM^% /ApplyDir:W:\ /CheckIntegrity /Verify ^|^| call :fail ^"dism.exe encountered an error.^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Making system partition bootable^"&echo:bcdboot.exe W:\Windows /s S: ^|^| call :fail ^"bcdboot.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:bcdedit.exe /set {fwbootmgr} bootsequence {bootmgr})

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Copying answer file to target disk^"&echo:mkdir W:\Windows\Panther&echo:copy ^%XML_FILE^% W:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER ()

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Adding drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder to new installation^"&echo:dism.exe /Add-Driver /Image:W:\ /Driver:^"^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^%^" /Recurse&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"Setting time zone^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Image:W:\ /Set-TimeZone:^"Central Europe Standard Time^"&echo:call :print ^"Setting device setup region to Serbia (GeoID 271^)^"&echo:reg.exe LOAD HKLM\mount W:\Windows\System32\config\SOFTWARE)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:reg.exe ADD ^"HKLM\mount\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Control Panel\DeviceRegion^" /v DeviceRegion /t REG_DWORD /d 271 /f&echo:reg.exe UNLOAD HKLM\mount&echo:call :print ^"Computer will now reboot^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:wpeutil.exe reboot&echo:goto :eof&echo::fail&echo:echo:&echo:echo:Fatal error: ^%~1&echo:echo:&echo:pause&echo:exit 1&echo::print&echo:echo:&echo:echo:*** ^%~1 ***&echo:echo:&echo:goto :eof)
cmd.exe /c "X:\pe.cmd"

powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -NoProfile -Command "$xml = [xml]::new(); $xml.Load('C:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml'); $sb = [scriptblock]::Create( $xml.unattend.Extensions.ExtractScript ); Invoke-Command -ScriptBlock $sb -ArgumentList $xml;"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\Specialize.ps1"
reg.exe load "HKU\DefaultUser" "C:\Users\Default\NTUSER.DAT"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\DefaultUser.ps1"
reg.exe unload "HKU\DefaultUser"

Extensions.File:
HKU = &H80000003 Set reg = GetObject("winmgmts://./root/default:StdRegProv") Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
If reg.EnumKey(HKU, "", sids) = 0 Then If Not IsNull(sids) Then For Each sid In sids key = sid + "\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer" name = "LockedStartLayout" If reg.GetDWORDValue(HKU, key, name, existing) = 0 Then reg.SetDWORDValue HKU, key, name, 0 End If Next End If End If

<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <Triggers> <EventTrigger> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Subscription><QueryList><Query Id="0" Path="Application"><Select Path="Application">*[System[Provider[@Name='UnattendGenerator'] and EventID=1]]</Select></Query></QueryList></Subscription> </EventTrigger> </Triggers> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>S-1-5-18</UserId> <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> <IdleSettings> <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd> <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle> </IdleSettings> <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Hidden>false</Hidden> <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle> <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun> <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit> <Priority>7</Priority> </Settings> <Actions Context="Author"> <Exec> <Command>C:\Windows\System32\wscript.exe</Command> <Arguments>C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\UnlockStartLayout.vbs</Arguments> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>
